meanings.definition: relational database of the United States National Library of Medicine for the storage and retrieval of bibliographical information concerning the biomedical literature
synonyms: Medical Literature Analysis and Retrieval System

meanings.definition: small deciduous tree of southern Africa having edible fruit
small deciduous Eurasian tree cultivated for its fruit that resemble crab apples
a South African globular fruit with brown leathery skin and pithy flesh having a sweet-acid taste
